title: KTC Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: KTC Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
KTC Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About KTC Logistics:
KTC Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KTC Logistics!
